hero.title: Still can't read the Al-Quran fluently yet?
hero.subtitle: We have the solution. EzQuran provides Tajwid, Tahsin & Tadabbur classes with guidance from experienced and certified teachers.

services.title: What you
services.subtitle: We provide various services to assist you in your Al-Quran learning journey

iqra.title: Basic Iqra' & Tajwid
iqra.description: Learn to correct your makhraj and tajwid from basics to mastery.

tilawah.title: Tahsin Sanad Al-Quran
tilawah.description: Correct your Al-Quran recitation according to Riwayat Hafs 'an 'Asim.
features: Full recitation of 30 juzuk of Al-Quran

fardhuAin.title: Tadabbur & Stories of the Prophets
fardhuAin.description: Learn Tadabbur of every Surah in depth with fascinating stories of the Prophets.

tadabbur.title: Basic Fardhu Ain
tadabbur.description: Learn the basics of Aqidah, Taharah, Ibadah, and many more chapters with guidance from experienced teachers.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: We are here to help you. Feel free to reach out to us for any inquiries.
